member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ButtonBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that interfaces with a button control and generates a sequence of notifications whenever the button is clicked.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ButtonBuilderBase`1
member.summary: Provides an abstract base class with common button control functionality.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ButtonVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer representing a button control.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.CheckBoxBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that interfaces with a check box control and generates a sequence of notifications whenever the checked status changes.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.CheckBoxVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer representing a check box control.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.CheckButtonBuilderBase
member.summary: Provides an abstract base class with common check button control functionality.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.CheckButtonBuilderBase.Checked
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the button is checked.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ComboBoxBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that interfaces with a combo box control and generates a sequence of notifications whenever the selection changes.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ComboBoxDataSourceBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that interfaces with a combo box control bound to each data source in the sequence and generates notifications whenever the selection changes.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ComboBoxDataSourceVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer representing a combo box control bound to an arbitrary data source.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ComboBoxVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer representing a combo box control.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ContainerControlVisualizerBase`2
member.summary: Provides an abstract base class for visualizers representing UI elements which can contain other nested UI elements.
member.typeparam: The type of the container control exposed by this type visualizer.
The type of the workflow element used to create the container control.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ContainerControlVisualizerBase`2.AddControl(System.Int32,System.Windows.Forms.Control)
member.summary: Adds a control to the container at the specified index.
member.param: The index of the control, following the order of visualizer sources.
The control to add to the container.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ControlBuilderBase
member.summary: Provides an abstract base class for common UI control functionality.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ControlBuilderBase.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the control.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ControlBuilderBase.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying whether the control can respond to user interaction.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ControlBuilderBase.Visible
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying whether the control and all its child controls are displayed.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ControlBuilderBase.Font
member.summary: Gets or sets the font of the text displayed by the control.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ControlBuilderBase.FontXml
member.summary: Gets or sets an XML representation of the font for serialization.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ControlBuilderBase.Build(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Linq.Expressions.Expression})
member.summary: Builds the expression tree for configuring and calling the UI control.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ControlBuilderBase`1
member.summary: Provides an abstract base class with common UI event source control functionality.
member.typeparam: The type of event notifications emitted by the UI control.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ControlBuilderBase`1.Build(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Linq.Expressions.Expression})
member.summary: Builds the expression tree for configuring and calling the UI control.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ControlBuilderBase`1.Generate
member.summary: Generates an observable sequence of event notifications from the UI control.
member.returns: An observable sequence of events of type .

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ControlBuilderBase`2
member.summary: Provides an abstract base class with common functionality for UI controls that accept an optional sequence of command notifications.
member.typeparam: The type of command notifications accepted by the UI control.
The type of event notifications emitted by the UI control.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ControlBuilderBase`2.ArgumentRange
member.summary: Gets the range of input arguments that this expression builder accepts.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ControlBuilderBase`2.Build(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Linq.Expressions.Expression})
member.summary: Builds the expression tree for configuring and calling the UI control.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ControlBuilderBase`2.Generate(System.IObservable{`0})
member.summary: Generates an observable sequence of event notifications from the UI control.
member.param: An observable sequence of commands of type .
member.returns: An observable sequence of events of type .

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ControlExtensions
member.summary: Provides a set of static methods for subscribing delegates to observable sequences of event notifications.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ControlExtensions.SubscribeTo``1(System.Windows.Forms.Control,System.Collections.ObjectModel.ObservableCollection{``0},System.Action{``0[]})
member.summary: Subscribes the control to change notifications in the specified observable collection.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements in the collection.
member.param: The control on which to observe notifications.
A data collection that provides notifications when items are added, removed, or when the whole list is refreshed.
The action to invoke on each new version of the observable collection.
member.returns: A disposable object used to unsubscribe from the observable sequence.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ControlExtensions.SubscribeTo``1(System.Windows.Forms.Control,System.IObservable{``0},System.Action{``0})
member.summary: Subscribes the control to event notifications from the specified observable sequence.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements in the sequence.
member.param: The control on which to observe notifications.
The observable sequence of event notifications.
The action to invoke on each event notification.
member.returns: A disposable object used to unsubscribe from the observable sequence.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ControlVisualizerBase`2
member.summary: Provides an abstract base class for visualizers representing individual UI elements.
member.typeparam: The type of the control exposed by this type visualizer.
The type of the workflow element used to create the control.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ControlVisualizerBase`2.Control
member.summary: Gets the active control exposed by this type visualizer.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ControlVisualizerBase`2.CreateControl(System.IServiceProvider,`1)
member.summary: Creates and configures the visual control associated with the specified workflow operator.
member.param: A service provider object which can be used to obtain visualization, runtime inspection, or other editing services.
The object used to provide configuration properties to the control.
member.returns: A new instance of the control class associated with the specified workflow operator.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.DataSourceControlBuilderBase
member.summary: Provides an abstract base class for UI controls which can be bound to each data source from an observable sequence.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.DataSourceControlBuilderBase.ArgumentRange
member.summary: Gets the range of input arguments that this expression builder accepts.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.DataSourceControlBuilderBase.Build(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Linq.Expressions.Expression})
member.summary: Builds the expression tree for configuring and calling the UI control.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.DataSourceControlBuilderBase.Generate``1(System.IObservable{System.Collections.Generic.IList{``0}})
member.summary: Generates an observable sequence of values containing the currently selected item from the data source whenever the selection changes.
member.typeparam: The type of the values in the data source.
member.param: A sequence of collections representing the data sources to bind to the UI control. Only one collection is bound at any one time.
member.returns: A sequence of values representing the currently selected item in the UI control.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.GroupBoxBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that specifies a mashup visualizer that displays a frame around a group of other visualizers with an optional caption.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.GroupBoxVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer that displays a frame around a group of other visualizers with an optional caption.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.LabelBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that interfaces with a label control.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.LabelVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer representing a label control.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ListBoxBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that interfaces with a list box control and generates a sequence of notifications whenever the selection changes.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ListBoxDataSourceBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that interfaces with a list box control bound to each data source in the sequence and generates notifications whenever the selection changes.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ListBoxDataSourceVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer representing a list box control bound to an arbitrary data source.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ListBoxVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer representing a list box control.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ListControlBuilderBase
member.summary: Provides an abstract base class for interfacing with combo box and list box controls.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ListControlBuilderBase.Items
member.summary: Gets the collection of items contained in the list control.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ListControlBuilderBase.SelectedItem
member.summary: Gets or sets the currently selected item in the list control.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ListControlBuilderBase.Generate
member.summary: Generates an observable sequence of values containing the currently selected item in the list control whenever the selection changes.
member.returns: A sequence of values representing the currently selected item in the list control.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ListControlDataSourceBuilderBase
member.summary: Provides an abstract base class for interfacing with combo box and list box controls bound to each data source in an observable sequence.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.ListControlDataSourceBuilderBase.DisplayMember
member.summary: Gets or sets the property to display for this list control.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.ListControlDataSourceBuilderBase.Generate``1(System.IObservable{System.Collections.Generic.IList{``0}})
member.summary: Generates an observable sequence of values containing the currently selected item in the list control whenever the selection changes.
member.typeparam: The type of the values in the data source.
member.param: A sequence of collections representing the data sources to bind to the list control. Only one collection is bound at any one time.
member.returns: A sequence of values representing the currently selected item in the list control.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.MashupControlVisualizerBase`2
member.summary: Provides an abstract base class for visualizers representing UI elements which can be combined with other visualizers.
member.typeparam: The type of the control exposed by this mashup visualizer.
The type of the workflow element used to create the mashup control.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.MashupControlVisualizerBase`2.Control
member.summary: Gets the active mashup control exposed by this type visualizer.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.MashupControlVisualizerBase`2.CreateControl(System.IServiceProvider,`1)
member.summary: Creates and configures the mashup control associated with the specified workflow operator.
member.param: A service provider object which can be used to obtain visualization, runtime inspection, or other editing services.
The object used to provide configuration properties to the mashup control.
member.returns: A new instance of the mashup control class associated with the specified workflow operator.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.MashupControlVisualizerBase`2.LoadMashupSource(System.Int32,Bonsai.Design.MashupSource,System.IServiceProvider)
member.summary: Loads type visualizer resources for an individual mashup source in the mashup visualizer.
member.param: The zero-based index of the mashup source.
The mashup source for which to load visualizer resources.
A service provider object which can be used to obtain visualization, runtime inspection, or other editing services.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.PropertyGridBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that interfaces with a property grid control for browsing the properties of the workflow in which it is inserted.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.PropertyGridBuilder.HelpVisible
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying whether the help text box is visible.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.PropertyGridBuilder.ToolbarVisible
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying whether the toolbar is visible.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.PropertyGridBuilder.AutoRefresh
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying whether the property grid should refresh whenever the value of any property changes.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.PropertyGridVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer representing a property grid control.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.RadioButtonBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that interfaces with a radio button control and generates a sequence of notifications whenever the checked status changes.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.RadioButtonVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer representing a radio button control.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.SliderBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that interfaces with a slider control and generates a sequence of notifications whenever the slider value changes.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.SliderBuilder.Minimum
member.summary: Gets or sets the lower limit of values in the slider.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.SliderBuilder.Maximum
member.summary: Gets or sets the upper limit of values in the slider.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.SliderBuilder.DecimalPlaces
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional maximum number of decimal places used when formatting the numeric display of the slider.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.SliderBuilder.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets a numeric value which represents the position of the slider.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.SliderVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer representing a slider control.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.TabControlBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that specifies a mashup visualizer that can be used to arrange other visualizers using a related set of tab pages.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.TabControlVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer that can be used to arrange other visualizers using a related set of tab pages.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.TableLayoutPanelBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that specifies a mashup visualizer panel that can be used to arrange other visualizers in a grid.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.TableLayoutPanelBuilder.ColumnCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of columns in the visualizer grid layout.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.TableLayoutPanelBuilder.RowCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of rows in the visualizer grid layout.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.TableLayoutPanelBuilder.ColumnStyles
member.summary: Gets a collection of objects specifying the size ratio of the columns in the visualizer grid layout.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.TableLayoutPanelBuilder.RowStyles
member.summary: Gets a collection of objects specifying the size ratio of the rows in the visualizer grid layout.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.TableLayoutPanelBuilder.CellSpans
member.summary: Gets a collection of objects specifying the column and row span of each cell in the visualizer grid layout.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.TableLayoutPanelCellSpan
member.summary: Represents the vertical and horizontal span of a table layout cell.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.TableLayoutPanelCellSpan.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.TableLayoutPanelCellSpan.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class using the specified column and row span.
member.param: The number of columns spanned by the table layout cell.
The number of rows spanned by the table layout cell.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.TableLayoutPanelCellSpan.ColumnSpan
member.summary: Gets the number of columns spanned by this table layout cell.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.TableLayoutPanelCellSpan.RowSpan
member.summary: Gets the number of rows spanned by this table layout cell.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.TableLayoutPanelVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer that can be used to arrange other visualizers in a grid.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.TextBoxBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that interfaces with a text box control and generates a sequence of notifications whenever the text changes.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.TextBoxBuilder.Multiline
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying whether the text box is multiline.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.TextBoxBuilder.Generate
member.summary: Generates an observable sequence of values containing the contents of the text box whenever the text changes.
member.returns: A sequence of values representing the contents of the text box.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.TextBoxVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer representing a text box control.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.TextControlBuilderBase
member.summary: Provides an abstract base class for common UI text control functionality.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Gui.TextControlBuilderBase.Text
member.summary: Gets or sets the text associated with this control.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.TextControlBuilderBase`1
member.summary: Provides an abstract base class with common UI text and event source control functionality.
member.typeparam: The type of event notifications emitted by the UI control.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.TextControlBuilderBase`1.Build(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Linq.Expressions.Expression})
member.summary: Builds the expression tree for configuring and calling the UI control.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Gui.TextControlBuilderBase`1.Generate
member.summary: Generates an observable sequence of event notifications from the UI control.
member.returns: An observable sequence of events of type .

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ToggleButtonBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that interfaces with a toggle button control and generates a sequence of notifications whenever the toggle status changes.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Gui.ToggleButtonVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer representing a toggle button control.
